creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: madpilot
Date: Sun Jan 20 23:43:56 2013
New Revision: 310724
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310724

Log:
  - Update to 451
  - Update MASTER_SITES
  - While I'm here trim Makefile headers

  Submitted by: 	Jason Harris <jharris@widomaker.com> (Maintainer)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/less/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/less/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/sysutils/less/Makefile

+++ head/sysutils/less/Makefile	Sun Jan 20 23:43:56 2013	(r310724)
@@ -1,15 +1,11 @@

-# Date created:		8 Nov 1994
-# Whom:			ache
-#
+# Created by: ache
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	less
-PORTVERSION=	436
+PORTVERSION=	451
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.greenwoodsoftware.com/%SUBDIR%/
-#		${MASTER_SITE_GNU}
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.greenwoodsoftware.com/%SUBDIR%/ \
+		${MASTER_SITE_GNU}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	less
